evidence_refs: WM-6 K08: Removed items-start from kanban-board div — default flexbox cross-axis is stretch, so phase columns fill the container height (h-full max-h-full min-h-0). PhaseCard action list already has overflow-y-auto h-full inside flex-1 min-h-0 wrappers. Combined: dense phase columns now scroll internally rather than growing beyond viewport.
